overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a covered wooden arcade and emerging onto a sunlit futuristic city street with neon signs, palm trees, and moderate traffic. The scene transitions from enclosed indoor lighting to bright natural sunlight with a warm golden tone.

events.description: approaching the bright exit at the end of the covered walkway, light intensifies

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered arcade toward the bright exit ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead toward the exit

entered.detail: curved wooden ceiling and vertical paneled walls of the covered walkway
illuminated vending machine against the wooden wall
bright arched opening at the end of the corridor leading outside

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow covered arcade with wooden walls and ceiling, following other pedestrians toward a bright arched exit. The space is artificially lit with a warm glow, and vending machines line the left wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: building exit ramp leading to urban sidewalk

events.description: exits the covered arcade onto the sunlit city street
descends stairs from building exit down to sidewalk level

agents.ego_description: stepping out of the covered walkway and descending stairs onto the city sidewalk

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car driving along the wet street

entered.detail: glowing advertisement screen mounted on the building exterior wall
tall palm tree visible along the street
wet asphalt road with moving traffic and parked vehicles

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered arcade into bright morning sunlight, descending stairs onto a wet city sidewalk. A large digital billboard glows on the left wall as futuristic cars drive past on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial city street with neon storefronts and traffic

events.description: passing by parked cars and moving traffic along the street
maintaining steady walking pace along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past neon-lit storefronts and street traffic

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in opposite direction passing by on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large cylindrical building with rotating digital advertisements
temporary orange construction barriers lining the street edge
glowing neon signs for pizza shop and hotel
tall curved modern street light pole

segments.scene_description: Walking along the open city sidewalk, the character passes neon storefronts including a pizza shop and hotel on the left. To the right, a large cylindrical billboard structure dominates the view above orange construction barriers, while futuristic cars drive along the wet street.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with traffic lights and downtown skyscrapers

events.description: approaching traffic lights at the intersection with vehicles waiting
approaching pedestrian overpass and entering denser downtown area with tall buildings

agents.ego_description: walking toward the intersection with increasing pedestrian activity and tall buildings ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead toward the crosswalk

entered.detail: overhead traffic signal showing red lights above the intersection
elevated yellow walkway crossing over the street ahead
high-rise building with reflective glass facade and digital billboards
construction cranes atop buildings under construction in the distance
leafy trees lining the sidewalk providing shade

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a busy intersection with traffic lights and a pedestrian overpass ahead. Tall glass skyscrapers with digital billboards rise on the left, while construction cranes are visible against the skyline. The sidewalk is lined with trees and more pedestrians as the scene enters a denser downtown area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, enclosed wooden arcade into the expansive, sun-drenched streets of a futuristic city. It begins by following a character through a narrow, artificially lit corridor lined with vending machines, moving steadily toward a bright arched exit. As the character emerges from the arcade, the lighting shifts abruptly to brilliant morning sunlight, and the camera descends stairs onto a wet sidewalk where futuristic cars glide past a glowing digital billboard. The scene then opens further as the character walks past neon storefronts and a large cylindrical billboard structure, with the environment expanding into a wide urban thoroughfare. Finally, the camera advances toward a busy intersection dominated by towering glass skyscrapers and construction cranes, blending into the dense activity of the downtown district.
